location: Stormveil Castle — on a corpse inside a walled rampart section where an Exile Soldier operates a ballista, reached by platforming across rooftops and bridges east of the Rampart Tower Site of Grace

source.name: Corpse near ballista, Stormveil Castle ramparts

tactics: From Rampart Tower grace, jump the rooftops/bridges east through the area with a Banished Knight and Exile Soldier to reach the ballista platform
An Exile Soldier operates the ballista here — bait its shot from cover or close the distance quickly before looting the corpse
Several jumps in this rooftop route have long fatal drops, so take it slow rather than sprinting
lore: A composite crossbow, among the largest bolt-throwers in the Lands Between — its flexible non-metal limbs let it punch bolts through steel armor that stiffer weapons couldn't pierce.

builds.name: Strength/Dex ranged poke
builds.why: Highest base physical damage of any standard crossbow, useful as a free stagger/chip-damage tool for melee builds since it needs no extra stat investment beyond requirements

builds.name: Status bolt applicator
builds.statFocus: None — bolt type determines added effect, weapon itself doesn't scale
builds.why: High flat base damage pairs well with special bolts (Poison, Bone, Explosive) for utility ranged pressure on any build
